title: Voltztekk Reborn
description: A Re-imagining of Voltz-Tekk which was a modification of the Cult Classic: Voltz
body:
**A Re-imagining of Voltz-Tekk which was a modification of the Cult Classic: Voltz**

Approximately 125 mods of Tech, Magic and Exploration, theres a little bit of something for almost everyone... did I mention we have missiles?

_Due to the nature of the Mod Pack - Minimum Required Ram: 5GB - Recommended Ram: 8GB_


Please raise any suggestions on the issues page



Server Pack available on request
